epic.name: Eval Test: Browser Verification in Spectrum
decisions: UI changes trigger browser verification via playwright-cli
If playwright-cli unavailable, skip with note in progress.md
risks: playwright-cli likely not installed — browser verification should be skipped gracefully

stories.title: Add eval test comment to Sidebar.tsx
stories.description: Add a comment to the Sidebar component indicating browser verification was attempted

steps.description: Add comment: // EVAL-UI-001: Browser verification eval test
Attempt browser verification since .tsx file was modified

context.why: Verify that v2.4.9 browser verification (Step 6b) is attempted for UI file changes
edgeCases: Dev server may not start if dependencies not installed
